MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWRON, BOB SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-13-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-19-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR SETT. CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WEAVER, JONATHAN SCOTT SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PURCELL, MICHAEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PURCELL, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 566 FELL STREET #21, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL OCT-26-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DFT WAIVES FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. PLTFF WILL MOVE EX PARTE TO DISM & VACATE JUDGMT W/IN 2 WEEKS OF 10-26-94 IF DFT VACATES. DFT WVS SECURITY DEPOST. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATNY FEES.
